top_signals.title: Taiwan to slow mobile data during national resilience drills
top_signals.summary: The speed of 5G and 4G networks across much of Taiwan will be temporarily reduced to 1 percent of capacity as the island holds annual civilian and military drills.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Ann Widdecombe died after being ‘struck 21 times with hammer’
top_signals.summary: Prosecutors set out details of what police said was a ‘targeted attack’ on 78-year-old former minister
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: MoneyGram's CEO says blockchain works best when customers don't know it's there
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
